calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Request Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-25-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Lewis Gillian, #12355.

David Francis Perry, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Wells Fargo Bank, National Association.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Gloria A. Wardell-Hampton, aka Gloria A. Hampto, aka Gloria Hampton, individually and dba JMC ACADEMY.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- dismissed.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $77,805.77
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $0.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $77,805.77
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2013 Continued To Jun-05-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
